synopsis:
Issue 2 of 8, of the Marvel Comics The Mandalorian Seaon 1 Adaptation Series.
BATTLE WITH THE BEASTLY MUDHORN!
Having tracked down a valuable quarry, the Mandalorian must now contend with thieving bandits. Will the Mandalorian battle it out with the Jawas or is an alliance in the cards?
title: The Mandalorian #2
